nodes.context: Leading Chinese triad in Malaysia, based in Penang and Selangor, involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, extortion, racketeering, and loansharking.
Active triad in Malaysia, mentioned as one of the most active alongside Sio Sam Ong.
